pr_metadata.title: Add fact_payments mart with date partitioning
pr_metadata.body: Migrates payments fact from Oracle staging. Includes partition on event_date.
pr_metadata.head: feature/payments-mart

patches.patch:
+++ b/models/marts/fact_payments.sql
+SELECT payment_id, event_date, amount_usd
+FROM {{ ref('stg_payments') }}
+WHERE event_date >= DATE('2024-01-01')
